EUSR on AMR in zoonotic and indicator bacteria from humans, animals and food 2018/2019
Table 4: Occurrence of resistance (%) to selected antimicrobials in indicator Escherichia coli from fattening turkeys, using harmonised ECOFFs, 11 EU MSs
Country N GEN CHL AMP CTX CAZ MEM TGC NAL CIP AZM COL SMX TMP TET CS MDR CIP/CTX, CIP/CTX,
ECOFFs: epidemiological cut-off values; MSs: Member States; N: number of isolates tested; GEN: gentamicin, CHL: chloramphenicol; AMP: ampicillin; CTX: cefotaxime; CAZ: Ceftazidime; MEM:
meropenem; TGC: tigecycline, NAL: nalidixic acid; CIP: ciprofloxacin; AZM: azithromycin; COL: colistin; SMX: sulfamethoxazole; TMP: trimethoprim; TET: tetracycline. CS: complete susceptibility;
MDR: multidrug resistance (MDR). For descriptions of the analysis of MDR, CS and co-resistance see Annex A ‘Materials and Methods’.
